Signup-Keys.SIGNUP_VISUAL_TITLE: Start Your Journey with Qatrah Hayat
Signup-Keys.SIGNUP_VISUAL_SUBTITLE: Create your account now and join a community that helps support people in need of blood through a safe and well-organized platform.
Signup-Keys.SIGNUP_PAGE_SUBTITLE: Create an account to start your journey with us.
Signup-Keys.NATIONAL_ID_SERVER_ERROR: An error occurred while fetching National ID. Please try again later.
Signup-Keys.PASSWORD_STRENGTH_ERROR: Password must be at least 8 characters long and contain at least one uppercase letter, one number, and one special character
Signup-Keys.TERMS_AND_PRIVACY: Terms and Conditions and Privacy Policy
Signup-Keys.I_CONFIRM: I acknowledge and attest to the accuracy of all information entered.
Signup-Keys.YOU_MUST_AGREE_TO_TERMS_AND_CONDITIONS: You must agree to the Terms and Conditions
Signup-Keys.YOU_MUST_CONFIRM_ACCURACY_OF_ALL_INFORMA: You must confirm the accuracy of all information entered
Signup-Keys.GENERIC_ERROR_SIGNUP: An error occurred while creating account. Please try again later.
Signup-Keys.ACCOUNT_CREATED_SUCCESSFULLY: Your account has been created successfully.
Signup-Keys.YOU_CAN_LOGIN_NOW: You can now log in using your credentials.

Login-Keys.LOGIN_VISUAL_SUBTITLE: Sign in to access your account, track donation requests, and contribute to supporting people in need of blood safely and easily.
Login-Keys.LOGIN_PAGE_SUBTITLE: Log in and make a difference today.
Login-Keys.STAFF_LOGIN_PAGE_SUBTITLE: Log in to the Qatrah Hayat system.
Login-Keys.INACTIVE_ACCOUNT: This account is inactive. Please contact support.
Login-Keys.GENERIC_ERROR_LOGIN: An error occurred while logging in. Please try again later.

ForgotPassword-Keys.TITLE: Forgot password
ForgotPassword-Keys.SUBTITLE: Enter your email address and we will send you a verification code.
ForgotPassword-Keys.EMAIL_IS_INVALID: Please enter a valid email address.
ForgotPassword-Keys.EMAIL_SENDING_FAILED: Failed to send verification code. Please try again.
ForgotPassword-Keys.GENERIC_ERROR: Something went wrong. Please try again.

ResetOtp-Keys.TITLE: Verify code
ResetOtp-Keys.SUBTITLE: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
ResetOtp-Keys.OTP_MUST_BE_6_DIGITS: Verification code must be exactly 6 digits.
ResetOtp-Keys.OTP_TOO_MANY_ATTEMPTS: Too many invalid attempts. Please request a new code.
ResetOtp-Keys.GENERIC_ERROR: Something went wrong while verifying the code.

ResetPassword-Keys.TITLE: Reset password
ResetPassword-Keys.SUBTITLE: Enter and confirm your new password.
ResetPassword-Keys.PASSWORD_MIN_LENGTH: Password must be at least 8 characters.
ResetPassword-Keys.PASSWORD_RESET_FAILED: Password reset failed. Please check the password requirements.
ResetPassword-Keys.GENERIC_ERROR: Something went wrong while resetting the password.

Footer-Keys.ABOUT_US_FOOTER: Every drop of blood makes a difference. Join us in our mission to provide a better life for all and ensure that blood reaches those in need at every moment.

Admin-Keys.USER_MANAGEMENT_DESCRIPTION: Manage staff and citizens, review account status, and control user access.
Admin-Keys.SEARCH_PLACEHOLDER: Search by name or national ID...
Admin-Keys.NOT_FOUND_DESCRIPTION: Try changing the search term or filters.
Admin-Keys.CONFIRM_DELETE_USER_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to delete this user? The user will no longer appear in the lists after this action.
Admin-Keys.CONFIRM_DEACTIVATE_USER_MESSAGE: Do you want to deactivate this user? They will not be able to use their account until it is activated again.
Admin-Keys.CONFIRM_ACTIVATE_USER_MESSAGE: Do you want to activate this user? They will be able to use their account again.
Admin-Keys.CONFIRM_ACTION_MESSAGE: Are you sure you want to perform this action?

Add-Staff-Keys.ADD_STAFF_DESCRIPTION: Create a new staff account and assign the correct role, branch, or hospital.
Add-Staff-Keys.NEW_USER_STAFF_CREATION_MESSAGE: This national ID does not have an account. A new citizen account with staff role will be created.
Add-Staff-Keys.EXISTING_CITIZEN_PROMOTION_MESSAGE: This citizen already has an account. Only a staff role and location will be added.
Add-Staff-Keys.EMPLOYEE_DOES_NOT_REQUIRE_LOCATION: Employee users do not need to be linked to a branch or hospital.
Add-Staff-Keys.USER_ALREADY_STAFF: This user is already a staff member and cannot be added again.
Add-Staff-Keys.HOSPITAL_REQUIRED: Hospital is required for doctor users.
Add-Staff-Keys.BRANCH_REQUIRED: Branch is required for employee and branch manager users.
Add-Staff-Keys.ADMIN_DOES_NOT_REQUIRE_LOCATION: Admin users do not need to be linked to a branch or hospital.
Add-Staff-Keys.FAILED_TO_PROMOTE_CITIZEN: Failed to promote citizen to staff.
Add-Staff-Keys.USER_ID_NOT_FOUND: Citizen user ID was not found.
